title: Magic: the Gathering Bulk Box
description: Description This product is a bulk box containing at least 500 common & uncommon Magic the Gathering cards When you purchase one of these MTG bulk boxes, you can trust that you'll be getting: A mixture of green, white, red, blue, black, colourless & gold (multicoloured) MTG cards. A mixture of creatures, enchantments, artifacts, instants & sorceries. A variety of cards from a wide range of sets and expansions. Legitimate, real cards that are tournament legal. These bulk boxes are great for all sorts of players: New players looking to start their collection and to build their first decks with. Players looking to add lots of new cards to their collection. Groups looking to build multiple fun decks!
